name: Flipway
author: Luis Bolaños Mures (2020) / AGP port
description: Drawless connection game by Luis Bolaños Mures (2020). Black links top and bottom, White links left and right, with orthogonal chains of stones. On your turn either DROP — pick a 2x2 area and fill every empty point in it, provided no other 2x2 area contains those empty points plus another empty point — or FLIP a crosscut, replacing the two enemy stones of a 2x2 diagonal crossing with your own. Black opens with a single stone (in the full-board checkered setups, by recolouring a single white stone).
